statement: In every magma, Equation 1203 (`x = y * ((z * (w * y)) * y)`) implies Equation 4081 (`x * x = ((y * x) * x) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0345
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op w y)) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op (op y x) x) y)
